_doc: Mock dispatch table. docsai proxied to the real CLI; job/folder lookups return a canned Successful-job fixture (the fault is silent text corruption, not an exception); any other uip call returns an empty array. Matching is plain substring (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore without aborting.
